author: Jonathan Hunt
title: OpenAI’s TBPN deal shows how talent, media, and influence are collapsing into one
description: We saw an earlier version of this shift firsthand at HubSpot when we expanded into media through acquisitions like The Hustle and My First Million.
content: When OpenAI acquired TBPN, the reaction followed a familiar script: Was this an acquihire? A marketing play? A conflict of interest? All hype? Not wrong questions, just ones with answers that give an… [+5214 chars]
